prompt: Refactor the `formatZodErrors` function in the format package — rename it to `formatValidationErrors` across the entire codebase and update all consumers

assertions.text: No remaining references to formatZodErrors in the codebase (excluding report/docs)
pnpm typecheck passes after the refactoring
pnpm test passes after the refactoring
Report contains a table listing changed files with change type and line counts
Report contains diff blocks showing before/after for each changed file
Each changed file has a specific rationale explaining why it changed
Report contains before/after verification table showing typecheck and test results
Report lists which consumers import the changed export
Report includes a draft conventional commit message
